title: A Yank in London
writer: Maurice Cowan, Nicholas Phipps, William D. Bayles
actors: Anna Neagle, Rex Harrison, Dean Jagger
plot: In 1943 England, an American Army Air Force gunner falls in love with a corporal in the Women's Auxiliary Air Force who has long been expected to marry a British paratrooper Major, prompting him to go back to combat duty.
